ipos.summary: India's homegrown e-commerce major, expected to pursue a domestic listing after relocating its holding structure to India. A landmark consumer-internet IPO.

overview.introduction: Flipkart is one of India's largest e-commerce marketplaces, spanning online retail, fashion (Myntra) and fintech partnerships.
overview.businessModel: Earns marketplace commissions, advertising and logistics revenue across a vast seller and buyer network.
overview.industryAnalysis: Indian e-commerce penetration is still low versus developed markets, leaving a long growth runway.

news.title: Flipkart completes shift of holding company to India

strengths: Scale and brand in Indian e-commerce

ipos.summary: The world's largest derivatives exchange by volume finally heading to its own listing after long-running regulatory clearances. A landmark market-infrastructure IPO.

overview.introduction: NSE operates India's leading stock exchange, offering trading, clearing and market-data services across equities, derivatives and debt.
overview.businessModel: Earns transaction charges, listing fees, data and technology revenue, benefiting from high market volumes and strong operating leverage.
overview.industryAnalysis: Rising retail participation and derivatives volumes underpin structural growth for exchange infrastructure.

news.title: NSE receives final nod to proceed with IPO
